Notes: Primary key preservation. Non-negotiable.
Line ordering. Maps to Odoo's sequence for display order.
Parent PO link. Lookup: Exact PurchaseOrderID → purchase.order via x_aa_exact_id.
Product reference. Lookup: Exact Item GUID → product.product via x_aa_exact_id. Already mapped in Subscriptions/Items domain.
Unit of measure. Lookup: Exact Unit code → uom.uom via x_aa_code. Already mapped in UoM domain.
Tax code. Lookup: Exact VAT code → account.tax. Dependency: tax mapping not yet done.
Cost center → Odoo analytic distribution. Lookup: Exact cost center code → account.analytic.account. Dependency: analytic accounts not yet mapped.
Project → may also feed into analytic distribution or a project reference. Depends on Odoo project module config. Dependency: not yet mapped.
Audit field. Default to admin if unmapped.
Audit field. Default to admin if unmapped.
Hardcode to target company.
Expected delivery date per line. Direct match.
Audit: creation timestamp.
Audit: last modification timestamp.
Line description. Odoo's name on PO line is the description field (not a sequence). Direct mapping.
Quantity ordered in item units. Direct mapping.
Price per purchase unit. Direct mapping.
Line discount %. Odoo has native discount on PO line. Direct mapping.
Line validity start date. No native Odoo equivalent on PO lines. Custom field.
Line validity end date. No native Odoo equivalent on PO lines. Custom field.
Vendor's own item code for this product. Stored for reference. Can be used to populate product.supplierinfo (vendor pricelists) in a future product enrichment pass.
Re-bill flag (professional service). No native Odoo equivalent. Custom field.
Line-level notes. Odoo PO lines don't have a separate notes field. Custom field.
Cost unit code. May feed analytic distribution. Stored for reference until analytic mapping is complete.
WBS expense reference (professional service). No Odoo equivalent. Stored as GUID.

Back-to-back SO line link. Stored as GUID for reference.

Line amount in transaction currency. Odoo computes price_subtotal. Skip.
Computed: unit price after discount. Odoo computes price_unit_discounted. Skip.
VAT amount. Odoo computes price_tax from taxes_id. Skip.

Quantity in purchase-specific units. Odoo handles UoM conversion natively. Skip — product_qty + product_uom is sufficient.
Current stock level. Odoo computes from quants. Skip.
Projected stock level. Odoo computes dynamically. Skip.
Item tracking config — lives on product.template.tracking in Odoo. Not a PO line concern. Skip.
Serial tracking config — product-level. Not a PO line concern. Skip.
Whether fractional quantities allowed. Odoo handles via UoM rounding. Skip.
